scope: The approved disposable deploy-key exercise stopped before any deploy-key identity was created because deploy keys are disabled for the vexil-lang organization.

safetyBoundary.requiredPrecondition: The plan was approved and a new disposable read-only Key A was generated locally only. GitHub must permit repository deploy keys before creation can proceed; that prerequisite was absent.
safetyBoundary.stopCondition: Stop immediately when GitHub rejects deploy-key creation, do not retry with a broader credential or alternate production identity, and delete local ephemeral key material.

events.outcome: No matching disposable exercise key was present before creation.
POST was rejected with HTTP 422 before a deploy key was created: deploy keys are disabled for this repository.

evidence.providerAuditReference: GitHub organization GET /orgs/vexil-lang observed deploy_keys_enabled_for_repositories=false after the rejected POST
evidence.outcome: Contained failure. No deploy key was created, no SSH authentication or revocation claim is made, and the ephemeral local key material was deleted.
